items.name: 芽生神社本殿
items.description: 明治33年に建立。ヤチダモを素材に用い、1.4メートルの竜の彫刻をはじめ壁や破風に彫刻が施されている。昭和12年10月にさや掛け施工。

en.description_en: The main hall (honden) of Memu Shrine, classified as a tangible cultural property. It is municipally designated by Fukagawa City (designated 20 May 1971) and is located at Memu 6-go Hondori, Fukagawa City.

items.name: 屯田兵屋
items.location: 深川市西町3番15号 生きがい文化センター敷地内
items.description: 明治28年と29年に一已と納内に入植した屯田兵の住居を復元移築した建物。

en.description_en: A tondenhei (colonist-soldier) dwelling, classified as a tangible cultural property. It is municipally designated by Fukagawa City (designated 21 June 1977) and stands on the grounds of the Ikigai Cultural Center at 3-15 Nishimachi, Fukagawa City.

items.name: 旧鷲田農場事務所
items.location: 深川市音江町2丁目11番38号
items.description: 鷲田軍蔵氏が事務所と住居を兼ねて明治43年から3年かけて建てた。平成13年に改修。

en.description_en: The former office building of the Washida Farm, classified as a tangible cultural property. It is municipally designated by Fukagawa City (designated 21 June 1977) and is located at 2-11-38 Otoe-cho, Fukagawa City.

items.name: 音江法華駅逓所跡
items.category: 記念物(史跡・名勝・天然記念物)
items.location: 深川市音江町字音江42番地3
items.description: 明治22年6月に建物が完成し、音江法華駅逓所事業が始まった。上川街道の中継点として重要な役割を果たした。

en.name_en: Site of the Otoe Hokke Post Station
en.description_en: The site of the Otoe Hokke ekitei (relay post station), classified as a historic site. It is municipally designated by Fukagawa City (designated 3 July 1980) and is located at 42-3, Otoe-cho, Fukagawa City.

items.name: 屯田歩兵第一大隊本部跡
items.category: 記念物(史跡・名勝・天然記念物)
items.location: 深川市一已町字一已4151番地3-5
items.description: 屯田歩兵第一大隊の本部がおかれていた場所。現在教円寺の境内にある。

en.name_romaji: Tonden Hohei Dai-ichi Daitai Honbu Ato
en.name_en: Site of the Headquarters of the First Colonist-Infantry Battalion
en.description_en: The site of the headquarters of the First Tonden (colonist) Infantry Battalion, classified as a historic site. It is municipally designated by Fukagawa City (designated 3 July 1980) and is located at 4151-3-5, Ichiyan-cho, Fukagawa City.

items.name: 監的壕（カンテキゴウ）
items.category: 記念物(史跡・名勝・天然記念物)
items.location: 深川市一已町字一已2527番地10
items.description: 屯田兵の射撃訓練場跡。昭和7年に在郷軍人分会によりコンクリート造りになった。丸山寺の裏手にある。

en.description_en: The Kanteki-gō, a target-observation trench, classified as a historic site. It is municipally designated by Fukagawa City (designated 3 July 1980) and is located at 2527-10, Ichiyan-cho, Fukagawa City.

items.name: 先住民族の竪穴住居跡
items.category: 記念物(史跡・名勝・天然記念物)
items.location: 深川市納内町字納内4168番地地先
items.description: 納内東端に位置する約千年前の擦文時代の住居跡。発掘調査で掘立柱穴やかまど跡を発見、土器などが出土。

en.name_romaji: Senjū Minzoku no Tateana Jūkyo Ato
en.description_en: Remains of pit dwellings (tateana jūkyo) of indigenous peoples, classified as a historic site. It is municipally designated by Fukagawa City (designated 3 July 1980) and is located near 4168, Osamunai-cho, Fukagawa City.

items.name: 深川市水稲発祥の地
items.category: 記念物(史跡・名勝・天然記念物)
items.location: 深川市音江町字音江400番地12
items.description: 明治23年に高橋惣吉氏が音江川沿いの湿地に種もみをおろし、深川市での最初の水稲栽培といわれる。

en.name_en: Birthplace of Rice Cultivation in Fukagawa City
en.description_en: The site marking the origin of paddy-rice cultivation in Fukagawa City, classified as a historic site. It is municipally designated by Fukagawa City (designated 1 April 1982) and is located at 400-12, Otoe-cho, Fukagawa City.
